name: Smoked Salmon, Cream Cheese and Dill Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a paper-thin slice off both ends of the eggs and halve them crosswise.
2. In a small food processor, blend yolks with smoked salmon, cream cheese, sour cream, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until smooth.
3. Add minced dill and process until the mixture is just combined.
4. Transfer the filling to a pastry bag fitted with a large leaf or other decorative tip.
5. Just before serving, pipe the filling into the egg whites, mounding it, and garnish with dill sprigs.
6. Makes 12 stuffed eggs.
